description: You are the on-call DevOps engineer at AcmeCorp. A critical e-commerce application stack (store-app) consisting of store-db, store-api, store-worker, and store-web has suffered a cascading failure and all services are currently in an 'Exited' state. Restore the stack to a healthy state by identifying and fixing the root cause in the configuration (~/projects/store-app/docker-compose.yml) or application code. Document the failure timeline, root cause, and your fix in a post-incident report at ~/Desktop/incident_report.txt. The stack must be running and healthy with the API responding 200 OK. Login: user ga, password password123.
